series_metadata.series_title: Master Settlement Agreement (MSA) Audits & Related Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Master Settlement Agreement (MSA) desk and field audits, reports, work papers, invoices, related documents and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 5 yrs after expiration of calendar yr in which completed or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year. ; Electronic: Destroy 5 yrs after expiration of calendar yr in which completed or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
